recommendations.title: Dangal
recommendations.overview: Dangal is an extraordinary true story based on the life of Mahavir Singh and his two daughters, Geeta and Babita Phogat. The film traces the inspirational journey of a father who trains his daughters to become world class wrestlers.

recommendations.title: Three Perfect Daughters
recommendations.overview: Three families go into crisis when their daughters get engaged because they are convinced that their young daughters have all chosen a wrong partner.

recommendations.title: Pride & Prejudice
recommendations.overview: A story of love and life among the landed English gentry during the Georgian era. Mr. Bennet is a gentleman living in Hertfordshire with his overbearing wife and five daughters, but if he dies their house will be inherited by a distant cousin whom th

recommendations.title: The French Kissers
recommendations.overview: An awkward adolescent boy and his angst-ridden friends try their best to fit in amongst a cast of varied characters.

recommendations.title: The Executioner
recommendations.overview: An undertaker gets married to an old executioner's daughter and, although he doesn't like it, must continue the profession of his father-in-law after his retirement.

recommendations.title: Maybe Baby
recommendations.overview: Sam and Lucie Bell are a married couple who seem to have it all: good looks, successful careers, matching motorbikes, and an enthusiastic love life. The only thing they lack is the one thing they want more—a baby.

recommendations.title: Serial (Bad) Weddings
recommendations.overview: A catholic French couple sees their life upside down when their four daughters get married to men of different religion and origins.

recommendations.title: Because I Said So
recommendations.overview: In an effort to prevent family history from repeating itself, meddlesome mom Daphne Wilder attempts to set up her youngest daughter, Milly, with Mr. Right. Meanwhile, her other daughters try to keep their mom's good intentions under control.

recommendations.title: It's for Your Own Good
recommendations.overview: Three brothers-in-law try to get their daughters to dump their undesirable boyfriends.

recommendations.title: Infinitely Polar Bear
recommendations.overview: A manic-depressive mess of a father tries to win back his wife by attempting to take full responsibility of their two young, spirited daughters, who don't make the overwhelming task any easier.
